titles.title: Stopping Fraudulent Payments Act
Stopping Fraudulent Payments Act
Stopping Fraudulent Payments Act
To amend title 31, United States Code, to authorize pausing and segmenting payments, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 23 - 17.
Reported (Amended) by the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform. H. Rept. 119-684.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 597.

committee.name: House Oversight and Government Reform
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To
